headlines.title: Learn to build warehouse robots people enjoy working with at the Robotics Summit
headlines.summary: At the Robotics Summit & Expo, Anthony Jules, Robust.AI, will explore what it takes to bring automation into complex warehouse environments.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, insansi robotlarin depo ve lojistik tarafinda gercek saha kullanimina gectigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle automation, robot ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Tennibot launches Partner V2, its latest robotic tennis ball machine
headlines.summary: Attendees at the Robotics Summit & Expo in Boston will get a chance to interact with Tennibot's technology firsthand.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

political_items.title: Little sign of breakthrough as Trump's Iran deadline nears
political_items.summary: The US president is in a delicate political position as the final hours to Tuesday's deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz tick down.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: JD Vance due in Hungary to back Orban's re-election bid
political_items.summary: The US vice-president's visit is the latest show of White House support for the Hungarian leader.

political_items.title: Taiwan opposition leader makes first China visit since 2016
political_items.summary: Cheng Li-wun said she "gladly accepted" Xi Jinping's invitation and hopes to be a "bridge for peace".

political_items.title: Trump endorses ex-UK political aide Steve Hilton for California governor
political_items.summary: Steve Hilton, who advised the former prime minster and hosted a Fox News show, is running as a Republican.
